AC: 22
DEX: +3 STA: +3 WIS: +3 HP: +65
SV FIRE: +3 SV COLD: +3

WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2002 at 3:43 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591770854249
4 posts
It seems these leggings are now level restricted. Level 51 is now required, not recomended unfortunately. 12/23/02
▲ Page top
No Druid?
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2002 at 9:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965854709
133 posts
Just found it interesting that Druid is not a class that can use these. I see Ranger, Shaman, Bard...

Maybe there is a story behind this? Might be interesting...
▲ Page top
RE: No Druid?
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2002 at 8:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246830165
43 posts
Druids are a leather class. Shaman ranger are chain, bard is plate.

Though in a lot of a game this doesnt hold up at all.
▲ Page top
Price
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2002 at 3:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758442247
42 posts
Since this labels these leggings as NO DROP and they are in fact droppable, the average price is usually anywhere from 40-50k on these greaves. They give a very hefty HP bonus.
▲ Page top
RE: Price
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2003 at 8:50 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591757080838
View User Forum
Scholar
42 posts
Prices always start out way too high. As of mid-April, 2003, there are two for sale in the Bazaar, Prexus, listed at 8K and 8.5K.

nodrop incorect
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2002 at 1:19 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252265566
86 posts
legs are not no drop must have been changed saw them 2 days ago and cleric looted and at end we rolled on legs and some 47/50 2hander bothe went to other ppl than the cleric i belive cleric got one of the 2 twenty five ac sheildss

ps. i pretty sure the story is there seems to b no taunt in this zone so wate to tash ect (=

zaphod ench 58 nameless

# Apr 18 2002 at 1:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252265566
86 posts
was a named lizard the monk was pulling to zone named tae ew hunter was taller than the other lizards and usualy 3 came when he was pulled saw him killed 2 times in just an hour or 2 hope that helps

ps. ench use Glamor kintaz to mez here follow tash, root and reaccuring amnesia worked well for the adds

zaphod ench 58 nameless

Man. i want some! i thought cazic thule was lvls 15-35 though. i had know idea they changed it that much.guess ill go check it out.
▲ Page top
Yep, its a 50 plus zone now more or less
QuoteReply
# Mar 16 2002 at 2:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756505381
Scholar
1,075 posts

Mobs start at around 55 I think. My 56 was there and stuff was blue right up to red con.

It was hilarious to zone in and see most of the level 60 "uber" guild people in the zone huddled like scared little wussies right at the zone in.

It seems funny because I ran around the courtyard and its exactly the same as far as mob placement, they just all conned blue at 56 yet all these people at level 60 were cowering with the full compliment of classes such as enchanter and cleric. Instead they should just pretend they are 30 again for the most part and go start doing the darn zone.
▲ Page top
RE: Yep, its a 50 plus zone now more or less
QuoteReply
# Mar 16 2002 at 4:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758269925
15 posts
You would not say that had you killed anything in this zone. :)

It is hard. One needs a tov ready force to get much of anywhere.
▲ Page top
RE: Yep, its a 50 plus zone now more or less
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2002 at 11:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750368914
41 posts
LMAO need ToV raid force... One group can hold zin and pull everything from courtyard into there. Granted the shadowknight had a Primal 2hand weapon, but still, shouldn't be too tough to raid here.
▲ Page top
RE: Yep, its a 50 plus zone now more or less
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2002 at 7:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1644797854863
6 posts
One group can work all the way from the zone in to near the top on the temple. Then we run into 3 x 60 mobs, and we wiped out. :-)
▲ Page top
Not a 50+ zone, a 55+ zone though
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 8:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769682424
44 posts
I hunt here with my guild from time to time .. everyone is over 55, but only 2 of us are 60.
I , at 57 (now 58 sk) act as MT and yes, this zone is very very tough .. not at all for the casual player, even at 60, but most of it (from what i have seen) is doable by a single 55+ group .. 57+ cleric will be needed, and a level 60 chanter is required aswell. A 55+ rouge is highly recomoned but not required.
Also, you don't need to be in an uber guild or have the best gear in the game to hunt here, you will need good gear though. I wear a combo of my planar gear (umbral-fear) and some of the stuff from Umbral plains. My Ac is just over 1200 and Sk's uber taunt ability more than makes up for not being level 60.
We can easily hunt at zone in ... We can hold and clear the bottom floor of TR without any problems. Skeets we have held and kept clear, Goos are easy, but as far as we know, nothing drops here (insane xp though) Maze is next for us to try out, Don't know anything about the rest, but have heard that C4 is insainly hard and may be the "uber" raiding area of the zone
▲ Page top
